ideas.title: Add a mutation-testing pass (cargo-mutants) over blog-logic
ideas.why: The 'Mutation Testing' concept exposes that a 100% line-coverage floor can be gamed by assertion-free tests; a mutants report tells us whether the coverage gate actually catches regressions — a real strengthening of Verification Layer 1.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for search across posts + ontology concepts
ideas.why: Effortless content discovery is the top destination-lens gap (pattern: Linear/Vercel ⌘K); grounds the 'Set-of-mark prompting'/'GUI grounding' vocabulary into real navigation — fuzzy-jump to any post or concept without a live shell (explicitly not a terminal).

ideas.title: Live brain-activity view: real-time trace of the autonomous loop
ideas.why: The 'Agent execution tracing' + 'Operational transparency' + 'Build in public' concepts call for visualising the factory's own heartbeat — a canvas that replays reflect→propose→gate→ship→verify events from summary/telemetry, giving viewers a reason to return and watch the loop think.

ideas.title: 3D WebGL knowledge graph of the 654-concept ontology
ideas.why: The 'Software cartography' + 'Bidirectional linking' + 'Monotonic Knowledge Growth' concepts deserve a showpiece: a navigable force-directed 3D graph of all 7 domains with clickable nodes that jump to the posts/concepts they power — the single memorable, shareable interaction the site currently lacks (pattern: Obsidian's graph view).

ideas.title: In-browser open-weights model captioning the WebGL brain (zero server calls)
ideas.why: Directly embodies the dominant HN front-page signals (open-weights models, big LLMs on cheap hardware) and the '1-bit LLMs' + 'Memory-mapped weights' ontology concepts — a tiny quantized model compiled to WASM narrates the live brain/graph with genuine on-device inference, the ultimate 'whoa' proof of the stack.

ideas.title: Reading-time + copy-permalink anchors on headings
ideas.why: Reading-UX gap flagged by the destination lens — borrowing the Ghost/Substack pattern where estimated read time and click-to-copy heading anchors make long posts skimmable and shareable; the read-time calc is a pure fn the 100% coverage floor can guard.
